description: Watchful is a website maintenance platform for agencies managing WordPress and Joomla sites. It provides tools for updates, backups, monitoring, security checks, and client reporting across multiple websites.
summary: Watchful exposes one developer integration surface: a Premium REST API on app.watchful.net with a published machine-readable API spec and account-issued API key authentication; no GraphQL, MCP server, or first-party CLI surfaced publicly.
